_description: Actual match outcomes and per-question RBP results from the JTC SportsPredict platform

question_results.text: Will Luis Díaz (Colombia) score a goal?
Will James Rodríguez (Colombia) score or assist a goal?
question_results.note: Near-exact tie with crowd; we were 2pp on the wrong side.

question_results.text: Will Colombia advance to the Round of 16?
Will Antoine Semenyo (Ghana) have 2 or more shots on target?
question_results.note: ESPN zero-SOT-in-3-games signal trusted over a much higher crowd; big win.

question_results.text: Will Jordan Ayew (Ghana) score a goal?
question_results.note: Zero shots in 3 group games trusted; correct.

question_results.text: Will Colombia have 7 or more shots on target?
question_results.note: Favorite-team-SOT underpricing pattern -- flagged in JULY3_POSTMORTEM_DEEP_DIVE.md as one of 3 systematic issues.

question_results.text: Will Colombia score the first goal of the match?
Will there be 4 or more total cards shown?
Will Colombia be ahead at halftime?
Will there be 22 or more total shots?
Will Colombia have 6 or more corner kicks?
Will there be 3 or more offside calls?
question_results.note: Priced HIGH and lost; same day AUS-EGY priced this question type LOW and also lost -- part of the 5-match offside pattern in JULY3_POSTMORTEM_DEEP_DIVE.md (net -75.99 RBP).

question_results.text: Will the match have 3 or more total goals?
Will a goal be scored before the first hydration break?

key_lessons: Biggest win: Semenyo 2+ SOT (+18.38) -- ESPN zero-production data on an underdog-side player trusted over a much higher crowd number.
Biggest loss: 3+ offsides (-36.94) -- priced high (0.75) based on a team-history read that didn't hold; see JULY3_POSTMORTEM_DEEP_DIVE.md for the cross-match offside pattern.
Second-biggest loss: Colombia 7+ SOT (-20.33) -- favorite-team-SOT underpricing, same pattern seen in ENG-CDR and ARG-CPV the same week.
